summary_text: On 2026-01-30, an incident was reported involving a brute force login attempt targeting user 'sally'. The source IP address was identified as 5.1.57.22 from Czechia, and the destination IP was 155.140.254.100 in France. The incident was classified as high severity with a risk score of 70, indicating a potential credential access attempt.
